---
title: "Biostatistical Topics"
code-copy: hover
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: sentence
    canonical: true
---

{{< include ../_tool-chooser.md >}}

## Books

-   [**Survival Analysis - Techniques for Censored and Truncated Data**](../../books/survival%20analysis/Survival%20Analysis%20-%20Techniques%20for%20Censored%20and%20Truncated%20Data.qmd) authored by *John P.Klein* and *Melvin L. Moeschberger*

### Papers

Event Prediction

-   (BayesPET) [Bayesian Prediction of Event Times Using Mixture Model for Blinded Randomized Controlled Trials](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Y8nXg6bf_XfjDpRZ0pT0_untJkZW6FbC/view?usp=drive_link)

Unclassified

-   (EFS with Cure Rate) [Statistical Consideration for Event-Free Survival With Cure Rate in Acute Myeloid Leukemia Studies](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1kpQMpU3l2ole0fr8NYDmqCYlwND2Oe9V/view?usp=drive_link) ([supp](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1RVgfaOi6g-4x3yRUNxtQrpXDe1xgWcHI/view?usp=drive_link))
